title: Florida Becomes First US State To Sue OpenAI Over ChatGPT Safety Concerns
summary: Florida Becomes First US State To Sue OpenAI Over ChatGPT Safety Concerns Florida has officially become the first U.S. state to take legal action against OpenAI and its CEO, Sam Altman, escalating the global debate over artificial intelligence accountability and safety.
